docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 79406688)
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-05-26 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT, RECALL AND QUASH WRIT OF EXECUTION AND ENTER STIPULATION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL TO PROVIDE A PROPOSED ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: K. VALDES; NOT REPORTED. (D501)
PROOF OF SERVICE BY OVERNIGHT COURIER SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 79387777) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1188 MISSION ST LP

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1188 MISSION ST LP AS TO DEFENDANT IRBY, CHARLES MCMAHAN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 79156428) AS TO DEFENDANT IRBY, CHARLES MCMAHAN
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE-UNLAWFUL DETAINER (TRANSACTION ID # 79156428) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1188 MISSION ST LP

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1188 MISSION ST LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IRBY, CHARLES MCMAHAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1188 MISSION STREET #2222, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94103, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 79156428)
